nasb.text: But I say to you truthfully, there are some of those standing here who will not taste death until they see the kingdom of God.”

esv.text: But I tell you truly, there are some standing here who will not taste death until they see the kingdom of God.”

cnv.text: 我實在告訴你們，站在這裡的，有人在沒有嘗過死味以前必定要看見　神的國。”

ccb.text: 我实在告诉你们，有些站在这里的人在有生之年就必看见上帝的国。”

csbs.text: 我确实地告诉你们：站在这里的有些人，在还没有尝到死的滋味之前，必定见到神的国。”
